ios.subtitle: Build & Merge Your Empire
ios.description:
Merge materials, build your kingdom, and earn coins — even while you sleep!

Merge Kingdom combines the satisfying drag-and-merge gameplay you love with idle city building. Start with a humble village and grow it into a grand empire.

• MERGE — Drag identical items together to create something better. Wood becomes planks, planks become beams, and beams become cabins!

• BUILD — Use merged materials to construct buildings in your kingdom. Houses, workshops, manors, and castles — each earning coins per second.

• EARN OFFLINE — Your buildings keep earning while you're away. Come back to collect your treasure!

• COMPETE — Weekly Race events pit your merge speed against players worldwide. Climb the leaderboard for exclusive rewards.

• COLLECT — Discover all merge chains and fill your Collection Book. Can you find every item?

• RAID — Send troops to raid other players' kingdoms for bonus loot. Build your defenses or strike first!

• BATTLE PASS — Unlock free and premium rewards across 30 tiers each season.

Download now and start building your Merge Kingdom!
ios.promotionalText: New Season 1 Battle Pass with exclusive kingdom skins!
